prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: investigation board. Story world: The Harvest Men. Premise: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight.. Setting: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Threat presence: The Reaper Steward. Recurring motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Puzzle visual for "Lantern Route Triangulation". Objective: Merge three lantern route fragments to locate the hidden threshing pit.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.. Subgenre: folk horror. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Immediate scene brief: The Harvest Men - Lantern Route Triangulation Puzzle Board. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Any writing should be minimal, blurred, or partially obscured.
source_prompt: Story: The Harvest Men (the-harvest-men) | Hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. | Subgenre: folk horror | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds | Villain: The Reaper Steward | Villain worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice. | Motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Puzzle visual for "Lantern Route Triangulation". Objective: Merge three lantern route fragments to locate the hidden threshing pit..
